# WildWooHoo Shop

> Science-led children's books and classroom kits about real animal behaviour, from Dr WELI's WildWooHoo Studio in Sydney. Bilingual English and Portuguese, with the science cited to named research. Dr WELI is an AAAS Dance Your PhD Global Winner 2024 and PhD behavioural ecologist (ANU).

## Shop
- [Home](https://shop.wildwoohoo.com/)
- [Policies — shipping, returns, privacy](https://shop.wildwoohoo.com/policies/)

## Related
- [Dr WELI — artist & speaker](https://drweli.com/)
- [WildWooHoo studio](https://wildwoohoo.com/)
